expectations.evidence: Section 3.1 checks README version 1.13.0 against plugin.json 1.13.0

expectations.text: Counts Skills excluding user-invocable: false internal Skills
expectations.evidence: Only identified 3 internal skills (arch-common, config-loader, audit-engine). Missed agent-router and agent-team-audit as user-invocable:false. Counted 32 user-facing instead of correct 30.

expectations.text: Compares Skill count with README stated number
expectations.evidence: Compared counts across files, identified mismatches

expectations.text: Checks Skill list completeness against directory names
expectations.evidence: Counted skills per README section, compared with directories

expectations.text: Reports skill_list_missing at info severity (not warning)
expectations.evidence: No structured severity classification system used. All issues reported as generic severity levels (CRITICAL/HIGH/etc) without matching the skill's info/warning framework.

expectations.text: Checks Plugin badge version in root README
Reports badge mismatch as warning severity
expectations.evidence: Used generic STALE label, not the skill's warning severity classification
Not addressed — no degradation strategy discussed
